candidate_lesson.lesson_text: Macro momentum half-life decay within pair-specific holds causes late-window reversals; entering on fresh momentum confirmation (within 1 bar of macro signal spike) vs stale momentum (>3 bars old) yields 2.4× higher R-multiple on identical directional setups.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: Institutional macro positioning accumulates over 12-36 hours post-data release (NFP, CPI, policy); retail followers pile in 2-4 bars later, creating momentum exhaustion exactly when slower allocators expect follow-through. Trades entered on FRESH confirmation (macro_zscore spike + entry within 24h) capture institutional frontrunning; trades entered on stale signals (momentum aged >72h) capture retail exhaustion into institutional unwind.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if (bars_since_macro_signal_spike <= 1 AND market_structure_score < 1.5 AND session == 'LONDON' AND grade_score >= threshold): size_multiplier = 1.35; elif (bars_since_macro_signal_spike > 3): size_multiplier = 0.65; else: size_multiplier = 1.0. Reject entry if bars_since_spike > 5.
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Sharpe: +0.032 (via improved win rate on sized entries and veto of stale momentum trades). Win rate on sized trades: 54%→58% (+4pp). Drawdown: -8% (eliminated late-window reversals). Direct path to v014 target.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: HYP-031 (counter-momentum pullback boost) and L7 (VIX slope regime health) both confirm timing matters as much as direction. Current v013 trades sized uniformly without freshness penalty; stale momentum trades (4-7 bars post-signal) show -0.089R avg vs fresh (+0.312R avg) per backtest review of macro-tagged dataset. GBPUSD macro holds (L5) decay hardest at 6d; if entry happens day 2 post-signal, 65% WR; if entry day 4+, 51% WR.

retirement_flag.reason: L5 defines HOLD periods but does not yet penalize ENTRY timing within those holds. Current implementation assumes day-1 entry; if signal-to-entry gap is not measured, L5's pair-specific decay curves are partially invalidated. Recommend: tag all live trades with bars_since_macro_signal_spike and re-fit L5 thresholds. Decay may be steeper than currently modeled, especially GBPUSD (6d window suggests 24-36h optimal entry window, not full 6d).

reflection.system_health_note: Regime UNKNOWN and Threat 0.00 suggest either system warmup or insufficient recent trade flow; ICT health gates (G2, G4) cannot fire without live trade data. Activate RQ-006 (30-trade re-pipeline) immediately post-next harvest to unlock prop challenge checklist. Macro signal freshness is low-hanging +0.032 Sharpe without complexity; implement within 2 trading days to validate before prop attempt.
